title: Secondary 2D viewport open alongside the 3D view
capture_instructions: Both profile line points have been placed. The window is split: the 3D viewport occupies the left portion (240–1200px) and the 2D viewport occupies the right portion (1200–1920px). The 2D panel shows a Plan or Profile view of the slab with points visible. The Plan/Profile toggle and Point Size slider are visible at the top of the 2D panel.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, both points placed, split-viewport layout, 2D panel showing slab contents

annotations.label: Slab center line and vertex handles in 3D view
